HomeContentAbout

People do not share utilities — they share identity. Spotify Wrapped, MBTI, and every viral "which one are you" test work because they hand someone a mirror and a label they are proud to post. Alter Ego is that mechanic built as an AI product: answer a handful of honest questions and get back a named "alter ego" — an evocative archetype, a sharp-but-warm reading of who you are, your strengths and your shadow, and a one-line metaphor — rendered as a beautiful, screenshot-ready card. It costs ~nothing to run (local model + templated card), spreads itself ("what's your Alter Ego?"), and every share is an ad we never paid for. For the AI OS this is an audience engine and a factory proof: it builds the reusable "questionnaire -> AI identity -> shareable card -> captured email" machine that the business-vitals vertical then reuses.
